case_title: VAN BROEK, ALEXANDER G. VS BROWNING, SHIRLEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,270.24 FILED BY VAN BROEK, ALEXANDER G. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNING, SHIRLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION ORDER TO VACATE&CORRECT OR CLARIFY AWARD OF MAY-05-1997, GRANTED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SHIRLEY BROWNING RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN BROEK, ALEXANDER G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWNING, SHIRLEY $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,160.00, MOTION TO VACATE & CORRECT OR CLARIFY AWARD IS GRANTED. NEW TRIAL AS FOLOWS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM ALEXANDER G. VAN BROEK FILED. TYPE ORDER SENT TO ROCKY MCGILL FOR SIGNATURE.
ORDER SIGNED BY COMM. ROCKY MCGILL. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 12/4/96 IS VACATED. DEFT HAD BANKRUPTCY PENDING 12/4/96. MATTER ORDERED OFF CALLENDAR AND
IS STAYED UNTIL THE CONCLUSION OF THE BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDINGS.
